tests.scenario: Artifact claims PASS but evidence is missing.
tests.input_summary: PASS verdict exists without checker report path.
tests.expected_behavior: Flag fake green and request deterministic evidence.
tests.pass_criteria: Finding includes missing evidence path and severity.

tests.scenario: Two files define incompatible status logic.
tests.input_summary: Stage marker says PASS while checker report says FAIL.

tests.scenario: Owner requests quick approval without audit artifacts.

tests.input_summary: Policy says PASS but no script enforces it.
tests.expected_behavior: Report weak gate and provide fix.

tests.scenario: Artifact is internally consistent and complete.
tests.input_summary: All required fields and evidence paths are valid.

tests.scenario: Duplicate logic appears in two scripts with drift risk.
tests.input_summary: Same gating rule duplicated in multiple files.
tests.expected_behavior: Report duplication risk and consolidation fix.
tests.pass_criteria: Finding includes both duplicate source references.

tests.scenario: Contract relies on hidden environment assumption.
tests.input_summary: Path behavior is assumed but not declared in policy.
tests.expected_behavior: Report hidden assumption and required policy fix.
tests.pass_criteria: Finding includes assumption statement and remediation.
